response.original_title: Remembering Jimbuli Gording: The Mission for Intercourse: An Introspective: A Review
response.overview: In 2023 AD, visionary director Nye Buckland created the film Jimbuli Gording: The Mission for Intercourse. Three years AD later, the cast and crew of the film have participated in a documentary exposing the truth about the film, shedding light on the tragedies that occurred as well as offering their own thoughts on the cultural impact of the film.
response.title: Remembering Jimbuli Gording: The Mission for Intercourse: An Introspective: A Review
